channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: House Justice Committee to Proceed with VP Sara Duterte Impeachment Hearings Despite Supreme Court Pleas
item.description: The House Committee on Justice confirmed that it will move forward with the impeachment hearings against Vice President Sara Duterte even if petitions have been filed before the Supreme Court to stop ...

item.title: The Council of Andrews: How a Shared Name Became a Global Community of Support and Friendship
item.description: The Guardian’s feature explores the emergence of the 'Council of Andrews', a unique online community formed in 2019 by Andrew Patts to unite people who share the name derived from 'Andreas'. What bega...

item.title: Zam Nolasco Concludes Collegiate Volleyball Career with Benilde, Plans to Join Professional League
item.description: Zam Nolasco, one of the standout volleyball players for the Benilde Lady Blazers, has officially concluded his collegiate career in the NCAA. During his time with Benilde, Nolasco demonstrated remarka...

item.title: ABS-CBN Highlights Regional News Coverage for April 12, 2026
item.description: The April 12, 2026 edition of TV Patrol Regional, produced by ABS-CBN News and reported by Kevin Alabaso, continues its tradition of delivering timely and localized news updates to communities across ...

item.title: Man in His 40s Arrested for Alleged Criminal Damage to US Air Force Plane at Ireland's Shannon Airport
item.description: A man in his 40s was arrested by Irish police at Shannon Airport in County Clare, Ireland, on Saturday morning for the alleged criminal damage of a US military aircraft. According to reports, footage ...

item.title: Academy announces dates for 2027 and 2028 Oscars ahead of 100th edition
item.description: Di Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences don announce di dates for di 99th and 100th Academy Awards. Di 99th Oscars go hold on Sunday, March 14, 2027, while di 100th go happen on Sunday, March 5...

item.title: LENTE Conducts Voter Education Sessions in Tawi-Tawi Ahead of 2026 BARMM Elections
item.description: As part of its continuous voter education program, LENTE conducted sessions in Tawi-Tawi to prepare students for the 2026 Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) parliamentary election...

item.title: Fish farming project bringing hope to Homa Bay’s youth and local economy
item.description: In Homa Bay County, fish farming is slowly turning into a key driver of local development. The region, which lies along Lake Victoria, has been facing challenges with overfishing and declining fish st...

item.title: Ottawa man critically injured in ByWard Market stabbing incident
item.description: An Ottawa man was transported to hospital in critical condition following a stabbing incident in the ByWard Market area. Local police responded promptly to the scene, where the victim was found with s...

item.title: Jinnah Convention Centre Hosts Global Journalists Covering US-Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad
item.description: The Jinnah Convention Centre (JCC) in Islamabad transformed into a bustling media hub on Saturday as both foreign and local journalists gathered to report on the historic talks between the United Stat...

item.title: Big Brother Mzansi Season 6 Winner Liema Pantsi Returns Home to Qonce to Celebrate Victory
item.description: Liema Pantsi, the 24-year-old from Qonce, has made headlines as the winner of Big Brother Mzansi Season 6, taking home R2 million after her second attempt on the popular reality show. Having first ent...

item.title: Canada unveils 2026/27 plan to fast-track credential recognition for skilled immigrants
item.description: The Government of Canada has rolled out new targets under its Foreign Credential Recognition (FCR) Program for the 2026/27 financial year. The plan aims to make it easier for internationally trained p...

item.title: Yeast Cells Demonstrate Survival Mechanisms Under Mars-Like Conditions
item.description: Recent research conducted by Purusharth I. Rajyaguru and colleagues explored the resilience of yeast cells under extreme Martian-like conditions. Using the High-Intensity Shock Tube for Astrochemistry...

item.title: Police Suspended After Discovery of 18-Year-Old Woman’s Remains in Bokaro, Jharkhand
item.description: In a shocking development from Bokaro district, Jharkhand, the skeletal remains of an 18-year-old woman, missing for eight months, were discovered near Chas College in the Pindrajora police station ar...

item.title: Geordin Hill-Lewis takes over as Democratic Alliance leader
item.description: Geordin Hill-Lewis, the current mayor of Cape Town, has been elected as the new leader of the Democratic Alliance (DA), succeeding John Steenhuisen, who remains in cabinet as minister of agriculture. ...

item.title: Health Experts Warn of Rising Heart Disease Linked to Sedentary Lifestyle
item.description: Health experts in Pakistan are raising concerns over the increasing prevalence of heart disease, attributing much of the rise to sedentary lifestyles, poor diet, and colder temperatures. Associate Pro...

item.title: Border Management Authority reports fewer illegal crossings and more arrests during Easter period
item.description: The Border Management Authority (BMA) has announced significant improvements in South Africa’s border enforcement efforts over the 2026 Easter period. Between late March and early April, the BMA inter...

item.title: Trump claims advanced U.S.-Iran talks, cautions China on arms involvement
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump announced that Washington is currently engaged in what he described as 'very deep negotiations' with Iran, signaling renewed diplomatic efforts amid ongoing regional...

item.title: Asha Bhosle’s remarkable contribution to Tamil film music with Ilaiyaraaja
item.description: Asha Bhosle, one of India’s most revered playback singers, holds a special place in the history of Tamil cinema despite having recorded only a limited number of Tamil songs. Her partnership with music...

item.title: Readers Share Thoughts on Everyday Oddities and Language Quirks
item.description: This Column 8 piece in The Sydney Morning Herald features a selection of reader letters commenting on various everyday observations and curiosities. Topics range from practical concerns, like the repo...
